title: Sound Intelligence Model
description: Built an audio processing model to identify and classify unique sound signatures. Applications in predictive maintenance and security. Blog write-up coming soon.

title: AI Intrusion Detection
description: Novel IDS using deep learning to detect anomalous network behavior and zero-day threats in real-time.

title: 4D Printing of Metamaterials
description: Exploring 4D-printed structures that can change shape or function in response to environmental stimuli.

title: AI-driven CFD & FEA
description: Integrating Physics-Informed ML with CFD and FEA solvers to accelerate simulation times — parametric ANSYS Fluent sweeps (PyFluent) feeding neural surrogate models that predict full flow fields in milliseconds.

title: Galvanic Corrosion Prediction — PINN
description: A Physics-Informed Neural Network (graph-based, PyTorch Geometric) that predicts galvanic corrosion in multi-material assemblies. Kirchhoff's Current Law and thermodynamic consistency are enforced directly in the loss, predicting galvanic current density and material compatibility — served through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

title: Materials Inverse Design — Reinforcement Learning
description: Inverse design of steel heat treatments using policy-gradient reinforcement learning (PPO) over a feed-forward MLP ensemble forward model, benchmarked against a KNN baseline. Input a composition and target mechanical properties — get ranked heat-treatment schedules (austenitize, quench, temper) with uncertainty estimates.
